chaptersLine: Forty-plus chapters drafted, plus an introduction and a closing coda.
spanLine: From before the Civil War to the drops of 2026.
thisWeek: Confirmed a century-old language thread that runs straight through the book's central argument.
Re-dated one of the cap's earliest origin points after a fresh sourcing pass.
Filed three brand-new 2026 releases as evidence the story is still being written in real time.
